heading: “Central American countries” defined
label: 2276 “Central American countries” defined
text: For the purposes of this part, the term “Central American countries” includes Belize, Costa Rica, El Salvador, Guatemala, Honduras, Nicaragua, Panama, and regional programs which benefit such countries.
notes: CodificationAnother is classified to .section 466 of Pub. L. 87–195section 2286 of this title
